response.step_by_step_log: The video features two distinct performances. I identified the first song as 'Non-Fiction' performed by Kiara, Ina'nis, and Calliope, and the second song as 'Blazing' performed by IRyS. I performed a web search to confirm the song titles and obtain the full lyrics for both. I then structured this information into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: This video features two musical performances by Hololive English VTubers. The first performance is a group song titled 'Non-Fiction' by Hololive English -Myth-, performed by Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope. The second performance is a solo song titled 'Blazing' by IRyS. Both performances feature choreography and stage effects.

scenes.description: Group performance by Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope on stage with choreography. Song: 'Non-Fiction'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Some 'once upon a time' is not where our myth belongs
Through the faded lines of words and rhyme is a hidden song
Though fractured deeply, worn by sorrows from time and time again
Take my hand and enter our 'pretend'

By star-lit skies, endlessly writing
Inviting those along
Lost souls who hear our song when gone astray
Though strife's part of life, stay unafraid, now
When forces say 'behave'
We say instead, 'be brave'

In a desperate shout, our souls reach out
With pen toward every page
We ignite, come alive like a starry night
With a fire no doubts can take away
Got no fairy tale where 'love prevails'
Though painful, now we move endlessly on
By the light, your spark
Head first, into the dark

Some 'once upon a time' is not where a voice gets heard
Will the faded lines of speeding time make us flightless birds?
When pen is running dry, a soul on fire is driven to react
And when burning flames attack, we will never fade to black
Though fake, it seems, not a dream or a trick of light
Always vacancy, take a seat, it's our story's time
A world is brought to life, through voices five
And as 'real' as they say
Pen as sword, we're choosing fate
We can never lose our way

By star-lit skies, endlessly writing
Inviting those along
Lost souls who hear our song when gone astray
Though strife's part of life, stay unafraid, now
When forces say 'behave'
We say instead, 'be brave'

Defiant 'til the end, I'll stay killing to sing
I'll dance in burning embers unyielding
Your love's given me wings
While learning to remember the good times we bring
Our ocean's finally full of life
Set every vital piece in motion, now we write

In a desperate shout, our souls reach out
With pen toward every page
We ignite, come alive like a starry night
With a fire no doubts can take away
Write a fairy tale where 'love prevails'
Cliched, maybe, we move joyfully on
By the light, your spark
Hopeless days are just a part of being free
We wrote it all by heart

And smile, side by side among the stars

scenes.description: Solo performance by IRyS on stage with choreography and fire effects. Song: 'Blazing'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Can't control it anymore, I'm burnin' up red
Crazy thoughts fillin' my head
(Tension rising to the top,
Won't look back, I'll never stop,
Blazing, boiling, gettin' hot
It's your fault, baby)
Fever burning up inside,
It can't be contained
Got my heart goin' up in flames
Tell me you can feel the searing heat
(Come on and come on I wanna confess,
Baby oh baby I'm gettin' obsessed)
Are you gonna run away, or burn up with me?
(Crank it up, crank it up, hotter and hotter,
Gonna be wanna be ready for more)
I'm caught in a heat wave, I'll never get enough,
Fanning the flame of love
(And now it's taking over)
Blazin' fire, make me a believer,
I'm gettin' dizzy from the smoke in the air.
Wild desire, burnin' like a fever,
Come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame
Keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name
Sweet love burn me away
I'm gonna wanna turn it up, I'm burnin' up, can't get enough
Maybe I'm too hot to touch,
It's your fault, baby
I can't hide it anymore, I'm bearing my soul,
Let these flames swallow me whole
This is how we're gonna play;
A dangerous game,
Got your fire runnin' through my veins
Baby, can't you read between the lines?
(Look at me, look at me turnin' to ash,
Breakin' me shakin' me makin' me crash)
Gonna sear it all away until you're mine
(Drivin' me drivin' me drivin' me crazy,
Tellin' me tellin' me what do you mean)
I'm caught in a heat wave, I'll never get enough,
Fanning the flame of love
(And now it's taking over)
Blazin' fire, make me a believer,
I'm gettin' dizzy from the smoke in the air.
Wild desire, burnin' like a fever,
Come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame
Keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name
Sweet love burn me away
I'm only getting started…
Blazin' fire, show me your illusion
It doesn't matter if it's real or a dream,
Wild desire fueling my delusion,
I want you burning for me!
Blazin' fire, make me a believer,
I'm gettin' dizzy from the smoke in the air.
Wild desire, burnin' like a fever,
Come hold me close if you dare!
Fire lover, be my flame
Keep me burning
Fire lover, call my name
Sweet love burn me away

response.thoughts:
**My Approach to Analyzing the VTuber Performance Video**

Okay, so I've been given a video and need to break it down into a structured JSON format, as per the specified schema. This is straightforward, but attention to detail is key. First, I need to delineate the two musical performances within the video. Seems like Scene 1 features Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Mori Calliope performing together, and that runs from 00:00 to approximately 02:22. I recognize that one.

Next, Scene 2 begins around the 02:22 mark and features a solo performance by IRyS, continuing until the end of the video. My initial impression, based on the performance, is that in scene 1 is "Fairytale", and Scene 2 is "Blazing". I'll search to confirm those.

Now for the detailed analysis. For Scene 1, I believe the song is "Fairytale" by Hololive English (Myth). The performers are Kiara, Ina'nis, and Calliope. It's in English. I'll search for "Fairytale Hololive English lyrics" to get the full lyrics and make sure they're accurate. Then, for Scene 2, I think the song is "Blazing" by IRyS, performed by IRyS in English. Same drill: "Blazing IRyS lyrics" to verify the title and grab the lyrics.

Now, the JSON construction. I need to be meticulous, adhering to the schema precisely. That means proper escaping of quotes and newlines within the lyrics is essential. I'll have to make sure the timestamps are correctly formatted in MM:SS.mmm as well.

The steps are pretty clear now: identify the performances, confirm song titles and lyrics with searches, and then build the JSON response, carefully. I think I'm ready to begin the search for the lyrics.



**JSON Construction - Quick and Clean**

Okay, so I've got two tracks to catalog. First up, I'm hearing "Non-Fiction" from Hololive English's Myth crew. I've got the lyrics handy, and I've also noted who's performing – Kiara, Ina'nis, and Calliope. Time to get this data structured.

Next, I'm picking up "Blazing" by IRyS, and the lyrics are already right here. Excellent. I'm taking note of the performance being by IRyS. And I'm seeing the writing credit is by Stephanie Snyder, and the composition is by Nana Takahashi.

Alright, I think I have everything I need, I'm good to go and can start building the JSON. This is straightforward, let's get it done.
